creator: argentoff@rtelekom.ru
text:
Hello.

I've got the same problem on 6.2-RELEASE and Broadcom BCM5704:

$ uname -a
FreeBSD jupiter.rtelekom.net 6.2-RELEASE-p11 FreeBSD 6.2-RELEASE-p11 #0: 
Mon Mar 24 18:52:40 MSK 2008 
root@jupiter.rtelekom.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/JUPITER  i386

$ sysctl -a
...
dev.bge.0.%desc: Broadcom BCM5704 B0, ASIC rev. 0x2100
dev.bge.0.%driver: bge
dev.bge.0.%location: slot=5 function=0
dev.bge.0.%pnpinfo: vendor=0x14e4 device=0x1648 subvendor=0x15d9 
subdevice=0x1648 class=0x020000
dev.bge.0.%parent: pci2
dev.bge.1.%desc: Broadcom BCM5704 B0, ASIC rev. 0x2100
dev.bge.1.%driver: bge
dev.bge.1.%location: slot=5 function=1
dev.bge.1.%pnpinfo: vendor=0x14e4 device=0x1648 subvendor=0x15d9 
subdevice=0x1648 class=0x020000
dev.bge.1.%parent: pci2
dev.miibus.0.%desc: MII bus
dev.miibus.0.%driver: miibus
dev.miibus.0.%parent: bge0
dev.miibus.1.%desc: MII bus
dev.miibus.1.%driver: miibus
dev.miibus.1.%parent: bge1
dev.brgphy.0.%desc: BCM5704 10/100/1000baseTX PHY
dev.brgphy.0.%driver: brgphy
dev.brgphy.0.%location: phyno=1
dev.brgphy.0.%pnpinfo: oui=0x818 model=0x19 rev=0x0
dev.brgphy.0.%parent: miibus0
dev.brgphy.1.%desc: BCM5704 10/100/1000baseTX PHY
dev.brgphy.1.%driver: brgphy
dev.brgphy.1.%location: phyno=1
dev.brgphy.1.%pnpinfo: oui=0x818 model=0x19 rev=0x0
dev.brgphy.1.%parent: miibus1
...

-- 
Sincerely yours, Pavel Argentov.
